articles.description: Tesla, Space X, and Twitter CEO Elon Musk has maintained his push for McDonald’s to accept the meme-inspired cryptocurrency Dogecoin ($DOGE) as a payment method after previously putting pressure on the fast-food giant to embrace the cryptocurrency.
